channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: AI's tech debt is invisible — even to AI. I solved it at the architecture layer.
item.description: TL;DR — AI repeats your patterns badly, ignores existing services, and forgets every cross-session lesson you taught it. This isn't laziness — it's a new kind of tech debt: invisible, systemic,...

item.title: NovelPilot: A Novel Writing Agent Powered by Gemma 4
item.description: This is a submission for the Gemma 4 Challenge: Build with Gemma 4 Most AI story generators work like this: prompt in → wall of text out That is useful, but it does not feel like a real writing...

item.title: Event Triggers บน Garudust
item.description: core ของ Garudust เปิดเผย primitive พื้นฐานตัวเดียว: agent.run(task) ทุก entry point — ไม่ว่าจะเป็นข้อความจากแชท, cron job, หรือ webhook call — ล้วนลงเอยที่ call เดียวกันนี้ทั้งสิ้น...

item.title: Event Loop: como o JavaScript executa código assíncrono
item.description: O JavaScript é uma linguagem single thread, ou seja, possui apenas uma thread de execução e por isso depende de um mecanismo chamado Event Loop para coordenar a execução de operações assíncronas....

item.title: The Pre-Commit Hook That Catches API Keys Before They Hit Git
item.description: The problem: secrets in git are forever You know the drill. A developer hardcodes a Stripe secret key to test a webhook handler locally. They commit. They push. Maybe they catch it themselves and...

item.title: 5 Best AI Chatbot Plugins for WordPress in 2026 (Compared)
item.description: Looking for an AI chatbot plugin for your WordPress site? The options range from full-service live chat platforms to lightweight document-based bots. We tested the most popular ones and narrowed...

item.title: I built a Redis clone in C: From blocking I/O to epoll to crash safe persistence
item.description: I had been hearing about sockets, TCP connections, and networking for years without truly understanding what any of it meant at the code level. Building C-dis changed that. I learned the full...

item.title: 17 天 / 247 views / 0 sales — 我把 $9 PDF 砍掉，25 分鐘 spike 出新方向
item.description: 17 天 / 247 views / 0 sales — 我把 $9 PDF 砍掉，25 分鐘 spike 出新方向 如果你追過我前面 17 天的 ZERO-TEN build log，這篇是 Day 17。 不是進度報告。是換軌。 三個 verified 數字 ZERO-TEN $9 freelancer Gmail tracking pack，17 天累積： dev.to 21 篇 =...

item.title: [Boost]
item.description: I built React components that run Qwen2.5 in the browser via WebGPU – no server, no API key, works offline Dhruvil Chauhan Dhruvil Chauhan Dhruvil Chauhan Follow May 22 I built React components...

item.title: Most new GitHub repos are noise. The rare good ones get buried with everything else.
item.description: A while ago I published an open-source project I'd put real work into — tests, docs, CI, the whole thing. It landed to complete silence. Zero stars, zero traffic. It made me realize the problem...

item.title: Towards Speed-of-Light Text Generation with Nemotron-Labs Diffusion Language Models
AI is being used to resurrect the voices of dead pilots
item.description: People used AI on a spectrogram image of cockpit recordings to reconstruct them, forcing the NTSB to temporarily block access to its docket system.

item.title: Friday Squid Blogging: Regulating Squid Fishing in the South Pacific
item.description: The South Pacific Regional Fisheries Management Organization (SPRFMO) needs to regulate squid fishing in the South Pacific. As usual, you can also use this squid post to talk about the security...

item.title: Google goes for the glitter with disco-ball icons: ‘Are y’all sure you still want this?’
item.description: You can now disco ball-ify your entire Pixel home screen, says Google.

item.title: How VCs and founders use inflated ‘ARR’ to crown AI startups
item.description: Some AI startups are stretching traditional revenue metrics when talking about progress publicly. And their investors are fully aware.

item.title: Google’s AI search is so broken it can ‘disregard’ what you’re looking for
item.description: Google's AI Overviews are running into an interesting problem right now. Earlier on Friday, if you searched for the term "disregard," the AI Overview section would include a response like what...

item.title: Elon Musk can’t hear you over the sound of his $1.75 trillion IPO
item.description: The SpaceX S-1 is finally here, and the story it tells goes way further than rockets. The filing runs to 36 pages of risk factors alone, and the numbers inside match the ambition: a $28 trillion...

item.title: Texas AG sues Meta over claims that WhatsApp doesn't provide end-to-end encryption
item.description: Critics note a lack of factual support in lawsuit filed by US Senate candidate.

item.title: Catch up on the Dialogues stage at Google I/O 2026.
item.description: Alphabet CEO Sundar Pichai in conversation on the I/O 2026 Dialogues stage

item.title: Twelve South’s AirFly Pro 2 has hit one of its best prices ahead of summer travel
item.description: With Memorial day weekend kicking off the travel season, we’re seeing a lot of deals pop up on travel gadgets, from portable power banks to noise-canceling headphones. One of the best right now is...

item.title: First VPN Dismantled in Global Takedown Over Use by 25 Ransomware Groups
item.description: Authorities in Europe and North America have announced the dismantling of a criminal virtual private network (VPN) service used by criminal actors to obscure the origins of ransomware attacks,...

item.title: Meta’s Forum is part Reddit, part Facebook, and part Google AI Overview
item.description: Meta's new Forum app for iPhones takes Facebook Groups and moves them to a dedicated app with a dedicated AI chatbot to go with it, like an AI revamp of the ill-fated Groups app Facebook shut down...

item.title: Elon, stop trying to make Grok happen
item.description: There is a harsh truth about Elon Musk's "truth-seeking" AI chatbot Grok: It's not very good, and not many people are using it. That's the takeaway of a new Reuters report, which found that Grok...

item.title: The best Memorial Day sales you can shop this weekend
item.description: Memorial Day is nearly here, meaning the seasonal sales are in full swing. If your weekend plans involve pool parties or barbecues, now is a great time to pick up a portable speaker or set of...

item.title: Lawmakers Demand Answers as CISA Tries to Contain Data Leak
item.description: Lawmakers in both houses of Congress are demanding answers from the U.S. Cybersecurity & Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) after KrebsOnSecurity reported this week that a CISA contractor...

item.title: Govee’s colorful, JBL-tuned Lamp Pro 2 is matching its best price to date
item.description: They say that Memorial Day marks the unofficial start of summer. I have my doubts given the less-than-balmy weather in many parts of the US this weekend, though that doesn’t mean it’s not an...

item.title: Google appeals search monopoly ruling, says it won business ‘fair and square’
item.description: Google officially filed its appeal of the federal ruling deeming it an illegal search monopolist, arguing the decision "crashed" through legal guardrails. "Google just prevailed in the marketplace...

item.title: Ghostwriter Targets Ukraine Government Entities with Prometheus Phishing Malware
item.description: The Belarus-aligned threat actor known as Ghostwriter (aka UAC-0057 and UNC1151Ukraine's National Security and Defense Council) has been observed using lures related to Prometheus, a Ukrainian...

item.title: Waymo suspends freeway driving amid safety concerns
item.description: On Thursday, Waymo customers opened up the app and noticed something unusual: no more freeway service. Trips that would normally take a few minutes on the freeway were suddenly projected to last...

item.title: You can no longer Google the word ‘disregard’
item.description: After Google Search's AI update, the word "disregard" now effectively breaks the search interface.
